since_last: 64% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +1.94%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.69% · BTC -0.02% · Gold +0.14% · Nasdaq100 +1.13%. 64% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +1.94%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +1.94%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +7.40%, POWL +5.61%, FTNT +4.66%, VST +4.25%. Laggards: IBM -24.53%, ISRG -5.33%, CSCO -4.30%, ANET -3.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.37% at $137.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.37% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
